text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. One key use is text understanding, where computers read and interpret written information, like identifying main ideas in a news article. Another important application is translation, which allows systems such as Google Translate to convert text from one language to another. Sentiment analysis is also common in business, as it helps companies gauge customer feelings by examining reviews or social media posts. Finally, chatbots use NLP to communicate with people in a natural way, answering questions or providing support. Together, these technologies make human-computer interaction smoother and more helpful.
